titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hammad Ibn Uthman
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hammad Ibn Uthman

segments: ه، عن حمّاد بن عثمان فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد ابن عبد اللّه؛ و الحميريّ جميعا عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن حمّاد بن عثمان‌.
arabic.text: ه، عن حمّاد بن عثمان فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد ابن عبد اللّه؛ و الحميريّ جميعا عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن حمّاد بن عثمان‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Hammad ibn Uthman has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah and Al-Himyari together, from Ya'qub ibn Yazid, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Hammad ibn Uthman.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Hammad ibn Uthman has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah and Al-Himyari together, from Ya'qub ibn Yazid, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Hammad ibn Uthman.
